records.citation: PR5a kaon hadronic bundle: NP-only M12 support for Q1_VLL and Q1_VRR only. Non-zero LR operator contributions remain unsupported end-to-end.
records.label: strict paper hadronic input bundle

records.citation: Uses the PDG neutral-kaon mass m_K0 = 497.611 MeV.
records.label: K0 mass listing

records.citation: PR5a reuses the PDG/FLAG charged-kaon decay constant fK+ = 155.7 MeV as f_K in the kaon NP-only slice. No separate isospin correction is applied.
records.label: Eq. (72.14)
records.source: PDG 2024 Leptonic Decays of Charged Pseudoscalar Mesons, Eq. (72.14)

records.citation: Uses the FLAG average hat{B}_K = 0.7625 as the underlying default source. In the default mu_had regime, the emitted B_K_mu_had payload is pinned to 0.5557449829565828 to preserve the canonical default export instead of being recomputed at runtime.
records.label: Sec. 17.3.2, kaon bag parameter discussion
records.source: PDG 2024 Lattice QCD review, Sec. 17.3.2, FLAG average
